item.text: `apply_patch` is blocked by this environment even for in-workspace paths, so I’m falling back to a direct shell write to complete the task inside `project/`.

Created [numbers.py](/data/data/com.termux/files/home/codex-test-workspace/project/numbers.py).

The script uses `range(1, 11)` to generate the numbers 1 through 10. The `for` loop assigns each value to `number`, and `print(number)` outputs it on its own line.
